_comment: Primary demo scenario: checkout service failure caused by DB connection pool exhaustion introduced in v2.4.1 deployment.
_purpose: Used by DeploymentAgent and MetricsAgent tools when USE_MOCK_TOOLS=true

incident.description: Checkout service is failing. High error rate since 14:20 UTC.

deployments.change_summary: Upgraded ORM from v3.1.2 to v3.2.0. Updated connection pool configuration.
deployments.git_diff_summary: orm_config.py: max_connections changed from 50 to 10 (regression in env var mapping)

deployments.change_summary: Minor logging improvements. No functional changes.
deployments.git_diff_summary: logging.py: added request_id to all log statements

expected_root_cause: DB connection pool limit reduced from 50 to 10 in checkout-svc v2.4.1 due to ORM configuration regression.
